Localization.Description: Action on link share file or folder

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} modified a link to the shared directory "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} created a link to the shared file "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} sent a link to the shared directory "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} removed a link to the shared directory "{datafield5}" from host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} resent a link to the shared directory "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} sent a link to the shared file "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} modified a link to the shared file "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} resent a link to the shared file "{datafield5}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.id} from host {src.host} removed a link to the shared file "{datafield5}" from host {event_src.host}
